Metadata.appDescription: Sign-in, registration and workspace flows for the Baisheng Management System.

ErrorBoundary.title: This page hit an unexpected error
ErrorBoundary.description: The failure was isolated to this view. Try again first, and reload the page if it keeps happening.

LoginPage.title: Login
LoginPage.asideDescription: Built for teams that value clarity and speed. Here, data becomes communication.
LoginPage.noteDescription: Design is not only visual form, but also a way of thinking and breathing.
LoginPage.headerDescription: Enter your credentials to access the Baisheng Management System.
LoginPage.mobileNoteDescription: Design is not only visual form, but also a way of thinking and breathing.

RegisterPage.title: Register
RegisterPage.asideDescription: In this digital workspace, we do more than manage data. We shape every detail with professional depth.
RegisterPage.noteDescription: Baisheng currently uses invitation-based access to maintain service quality. Contact an administrator or your referrer if you need an invite code.
RegisterPage.headerDescription: Fill in the details below to create your management account.
RegisterPage.mobileNoteDescription: Baisheng currently uses invitation-based access to maintain service quality. Contact an administrator or your referrer if you need an invite code.

ForgotPasswordPage.title: Forgot Password
ForgotPasswordPage.asideDescription: Reset your password through email and get back into your workspace within minutes.
ForgotPasswordPage.noteDescription: A reset link will be sent to your registered email. After opening it, you will return to this page to set a new password.

LoginForm.registeredNotice: Your registration request has been submitted. If email verification is required, complete it before signing in.
LoginForm.passwordResetNotice: Your password has been updated. Please sign in again with the new password.
LoginForm.serviceUnavailable: The service is temporarily unavailable. Please try again later.
LoginForm.invalidCredentials: The email or password is incorrect. Please try again.
LoginForm.emailNotConfirmed: Your email has not been verified yet. Please verify it first.

RegisterForm.passwordPlaceholder: Use at least 8 characters with letters and numbers
RegisterForm.termsPrefix: I have read and agree to the
RegisterForm.acceptTerms: Please read and accept the Terms of Service and Privacy Policy first.
RegisterForm.serviceUnavailable: The service is temporarily unavailable. Please try again later.
RegisterForm.referralRequired: The invite code cannot be empty.
RegisterForm.referralNotFound: The invite code does not exist. Please check and try again.
RegisterForm.referralMaxUses: The invite code has reached its usage limit.
RegisterForm.referralExpired: The invite code has expired. Please contact an administrator for a new one.
RegisterForm.userExists: This email is already registered. Please sign in instead.

ForgotPasswordForm.recoverySuccess: The reset link has been verified. Please set a new password.
ForgotPasswordForm.serviceUnavailable: The service is temporarily unavailable. Please try again later.
ForgotPasswordForm.resetEmailSent: The password reset email has been sent. Check your inbox and continue from the link in the email.
ForgotPasswordForm.passwordTooShort: Your new password must be at least 8 characters long.
ForgotPasswordForm.passwordMismatch: The two passwords do not match. Please confirm again.
ForgotPasswordForm.emailPlaceholder: Enter the email used for registration
ForgotPasswordForm.userNotFound: No account was found for this email address.
ForgotPasswordForm.tooFrequent: Too many requests. Please try again later.
ForgotPasswordForm.authSessionMissing: The reset link has expired. Please request a new reset email.

DashboardShell.serviceUnavailable: The service is temporarily unavailable. Please try again later.

AdminSectionPlaceholder.badge: This module will continue to grow with role-specific capabilities.

admin.title: Admin Workspace
admin.description: This module is still under construction. The admin workspace navigation is already in place, and detailed capability can continue to grow on top of this shell.

client.title: Client Workspace
client.description: This module is still under construction. The client workspace navigation is already prepared, and detailed capability can continue to grow on top of this shell.

finance.title: Finance Workspace
finance.description: This module is still under construction. The finance workspace navigation is already prepared, and detailed capability can continue to grow on top of this shell.

manager.title: Manager Workspace
manager.description: This module is still under construction. The manager workspace navigation is already prepared, and detailed capability can continue to grow on top of this shell.

operator.title: Operations Workspace
operator.description: This module is still under construction. The operations workspace navigation is already prepared, and detailed capability can continue to grow on top of this shell.

recruiter.title: Recruiter Workspace
recruiter.description: This module is still under construction. The recruiter workspace navigation is already prepared, and detailed capability can continue to grow on top of this shell.

salesman.title: Sales Workspace
salesman.description: This module is still under construction. The sales workspace navigation is already in place, and detailed capability can continue to grow on top of this shell.

orders.title: Order Management
orders.description: This area will handle order browsing, filtering, status flow, and exception handling. It will later be split into role-specific views for administrators, sales, finance, and clients.

referrals.title: Referral Tree
referrals.description: This section shows the referral relationships visible to the current role, including who referred you and whom you referred. Different roles only see the relationships allowed by database permissions.

team.title: Team Management
team.description: This section will cover team members, status metrics, and organizational collaboration details, with role-specific actions added over time.

commission.title: Commission Center
commission.description: This section will combine commission rules, settlement details, payout progress, and exception records, and will later evolve into role-specific views for finance and sales.

exchange-rates.title: FX Rate Management
exchange-rates.description: This section will maintain FX sources, update times, historical trends, and manual adjustment records to support orders and finance with a unified data base.

tasks.title: Task Board
tasks.description: This section will bring together todos, reminders, owners, and progress milestones to help each role follow business tasks continuously.

reviews.title: Review Center
reviews.description: This section will handle document review, identity verification, risk checks, and approval flows. It can later branch into role-specific review views for operators, managers, and clients.

DashboardShared.inputHint: After submission, this will enter the review queue.

errors.unknown: Something went wrong. Please try again later.
errors.duplicatePending: An identical request is already under review. Please wait for the result.
errors.duplicateStored: The submitted value matches the stored record. No resubmission is needed.
errors.permission: The current account does not have permission to perform this action.

DashboardMy.bundleUnavailable: Cloud profile data is temporarily unavailable. Refresh the page and try again.
DashboardMy.bundleSyncDescription: This page depends on active cloud authentication and profile queries. If a resume-from-idle sync does not return in time, the page now fails fast so you can retry instead of waiting forever.
DashboardMy.verificationApprovedDescription: Your ID information has been approved and the account is now verified.
DashboardMy.verificationPendingDescription: Your ID information has been submitted and is currently under review.
DashboardMy.verificationEmptyDescription: This area will show your verified status after the ID review is approved.
DashboardMy.identityPendingDescription: Your ID number has been submitted and is pending review.
DashboardMy.identityApprovedDescription: Your ID number has been approved.
DashboardMy.passportPendingDescription: Your passport number has been submitted and is pending review.
DashboardMy.passportApprovedDescription: Your passport number has been approved.
DashboardMy.photoEmptyDescription: Uploaded photos will appear here after they pass review.
DashboardMy.photoPendingDescription: At least one photo is currently waiting for review.
DashboardMy.photoApprovedDescription: Your profile photos have been approved.
DashboardMy.videoEmptyDescription: Uploaded videos will appear here after they pass review.
DashboardMy.videoPendingDescription: At least one video is currently waiting for review.
DashboardMy.videoApprovedDescription: Your profile videos have been approved.
DashboardMy.editProfileDescription: You can add your city here after registration. Saving updates the value shown on the My page.

DashboardMyState.missingEmailForReset: This account does not have an email address for password reset.
DashboardMyState.resetSent: Password reset email sent. Check your inbox.
DashboardMyState.missingInviteCode: There is no invite code available for this account yet.
DashboardMyState.inviteCopyFailed: Copy failed. Please try again later.
DashboardMyState.identitySubmitted: ID number submitted and now pending review.
DashboardMyState.passportSubmitted: Passport number submitted and now pending review.
DashboardMyState.photosUploaded: Profile photos uploaded and now pending review.
DashboardMyState.videosUploaded: Profile videos uploaded and now pending review.
DashboardMyState.identityDescription: After submission, the record will enter review and update your identity profile once approved.
DashboardMyState.passportDescription: After submission, the record will enter review and update your travel profile once approved.
DashboardMyState.mediaDescription: Uploads enter review first and appear in your profile after approval.

admin.title: Order Center
admin.description: The list highlights key order fields first. Open any order to inspect the full details.
admin.createDescription: After you fill in the basic order information, the new order is written to the list immediately.
admin.emptyDescription: There are no order records yet. Newly created orders will appear here.
admin.noPermissionDescription: The current account does not have access to the order center.

salesman.title: Client Orders
salesman.description: This page shows only orders related to you and your assigned clients. You can create new orders for your own clients here.
salesman.createDescription: This page allows new orders only for clients associated with you. New records appear in the list immediately.
salesman.emptyDescription: Orders for you and your assigned clients will appear here. There are no visible orders right now.
salesman.noPermissionDescription: The current account does not have access to sales orders.
salesman.noCreateTargetHint: You do not have any linked clients available for new orders yet.

client.title: My Orders
client.description: This page shows order records related to you. You can open any row at any time to review the full details.
client.emptyDescription: You do not have any order records yet. Future orders will appear here automatically.
client.noPermissionDescription: The current account does not have access to client orders.

feedback.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to soft-delete order {orderNumber}? It will be hidden from the list afterward.

states.noMatchDescription: No orders match the current filters. Adjust the keywords and try again.

filters.orderEntryUserPlaceholder: Search by user name or email
filters.orderingUserPlaceholder: Search by client name or email

dialogs.editDescription: Saving changes overwrites the current order information and synchronizes the order details.

placeholders.originalCurrency: For example USD, CNY, or EUR
placeholders.transactionRate: Calculated automatically from the daily exchange rate
placeholders.costAmount: Enter the internal cost, or leave blank
placeholders.purchaseDetails:
Enter JSON or one field per line, for example:
Product: iPhone 16 Pro
Quantity: 2
Delivery city: Shanghai
placeholders.serviceDetails:
Enter JSON or one field per line, for example:
Service date: 2026-04-02
Service location: Shanghai Pudong Airport
Guests: 3

hints.lockedOrderEntryUser: Orders created from this page are automatically assigned to the current salesperson.
hints.autoTimestamps: After creation, the system writes the created time automatically. After editing, the system updates the latest modified time automatically.

validation.invalidDetails: {label} is invalid. Enter JSON or one "field: value" pair per line.

errors.duplicateOrderNumber: Order number generation conflicted. Please try again later.
errors.invalidForeignKeys: Select valid order users, order type, and related purchase or service options.
errors.cannotCreate: You do not have permission to create this order.
errors.cannotUpdate: You do not have permission to update this order.
errors.updatedScopeNotAllowed: The updated order scope is outside your allowed range.
errors.cannotDelete: You do not have permission to delete this order.
errors.inactiveOrderNumber: Only active users can create new order numbers.
errors.orderNotFound: The order could not be found.

purchaseSection.title: Purchase Order Details
purchaseSection.createDescription: This order type is a purchase order. Continue by filling in the purchase details. The details field accepts JSON or one “field: value” pair per line.
purchaseSection.editDescription: This order type is a purchase order. You can update the purchase details directly. The details field accepts JSON or one “field: value” pair per line.

serviceSection.title: Service Order Details
serviceSection.createDescription: This order type is a service order. Continue by filling in the service details. The details field accepts JSON or one “field: value” pair per line.
serviceSection.editDescription: This order type is a service order. You can update the service details directly. The details field accepts JSON or one “field: value” pair per line.

details.description: Review the full order amounts, exchange rates, related users, and linked form details.
details.title: Order Details

supplementary.empty: This order does not have a related purchase or service form yet.
supplementary.noMoreDetails: There are no additional details in the linked form yet.

states.noPermissionDescription: The current account is not an administrator and cannot access privacy or media review queues.

confirm.privacy: Are you sure you want to {action} this privacy review?
confirm.media: Are you sure you want to {action} this media review?

privacy.emptyDescription: There are no pending ID card or passport submissions right now. New submissions will appear here.

media.emptyDescription: There are no pending photos or videos right now. New media submissions will appear here.

header.title: FX Rate Center
header.description: Review the latest effective currency pairs and their full history in one place so orders and finance use the same baseline.

states.noManageDescription: The current signed-in account is not allowed to manage FX rate records.
states.noViewDescription: The current signed-in account is not allowed to view FX rate records.

latest.title: Latest FX Rates
latest.description: Each currency pair keeps only its latest effective value, ordered by the most recent update time.
latest.emptyDescription: There are no FX rate records yet. New rates will appear here first.
latest.noMatchDescription: No latest FX rates match the current filters.

history.title: History Records
history.emptyDescription: There are no FX rate history records yet. New rates will appear here in reverse chronological order.
history.noMatchDescription: No history records match the current filters.

dialogs.currencyHint: Currency codes are normalized to uppercase on save. For example, usd becomes USD.

create.title: Create FX Rate
create.description: After saving, the new entry is written to the history list immediately and the latest value for the pair is refreshed.

edit.title: Edit FX Rate
edit.description: Saving updates this history record directly and refreshes the latest value for the same currency pair.

feedback.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete the FX rate record for {pairLabel}? This action cannot be undone.

validation.originalCurrencyRequired: Please enter the original currency code.
validation.targetCurrencyRequired: Please enter the target currency code.

errors.duplicateKey: Saving the FX rate failed. Check for an existing duplicate key and try again.
errors.positiveRate: The FX rate value must be greater than 0.
errors.permission: The current account does not have permission to view or manage FX rate data.

states.noPermissionDescription: The current account is not active, so the referral tree cannot be viewed right now.
states.emptyDescription: There are no referral relationships in your visible scope yet. New invitation signups will appear here automatically.
states.noMatchDescription: No referral relationships match the current search. Try a different name, email, or role.

tree.title: Referral Hierarchy
tree.searchPlaceholder: Search by name, email, or role

sections.manager: Managers can view their own upstream and downstream relationships, plus the referral chains of each sales account in their team. Team sales members are marked separately in the tree.
sections.recruiter: Recruiters can see who referred them and which sales accounts they referred. The tree does not expand into unrelated team relationships.
sections.default: This view shows your direct upstream and downstream relationships in a tree hierarchy instead of separate lists.

errors.noPermission: The current account does not have permission to view the referral tree.

header.title: Commission Board
header.description: Review all commission records, settlement progress, and beneficiary breakdowns in one place.

states.noPermissionDescription: The current account cannot view the full commission board.

filters.title: Filter Commissions
filters.description: {records} records across {beneficiaries} beneficiaries match the current filters.
filters.keywordPlaceholder: Search order, user, email, or category

beneficiaries.title: Beneficiary Summary
beneficiaries.description: Click a beneficiary to focus the board on all commission records linked to that person.
beneficiaries.emptyDescription: No beneficiaries match the current filters.

table.title: Commission Details
table.description: Inspect each commission line by order, beneficiary, source relationship, and settlement history.
table.emptyDescription: No commission records match the current filters.

origin.referralPurchase: Generated from referred purchase order {orderNumber} for {customerLabel}.
origin.referralService: Generated from referred service order {orderNumber} for {customerLabel}.
origin.referralVipFirstYearBonus: Generated from referred VIP first-year order {orderNumber} for {customerLabel}.

errors.noAdminAccess: The current account cannot view the full commission board.
errors.noSalesmanAccess: The current account cannot view personal commission records.

header.title: Salesman Commission History
header.description: Review your own commission totals, settlement progress, and the order sources behind each payout.

states.noPermissionDescription: The current account cannot view personal commission records.
states.emptyDescription: This account does not have commission records yet.

table.title: Commission History
table.description: Each record shows where the commission came from, which order generated it, and whether it has already been settled.

admin.taskNameBlank: The task name cannot be empty.
admin.teamRequired: A team task must be linked to a specific team.
admin.authExpired: Your session has expired. Sign in again and retry.
admin.taskNotFound: The task no longer exists. Refresh the task list and try again.
admin.duplicateAttachmentPath: An attachment path conflict was detected. Upload the file again.
admin.attachmentCountExceeded: Too many attachments were selected. Upload at most 10 files.
admin.attachmentEmpty: An empty file was detected. Attachments must be larger than 0 bytes.
admin.attachmentTooLarge: At least one attachment is too large. Each file must stay within 20 MB.
admin.attachmentTotalTooLarge: The attachments are too large altogether. Keep the total within 100 MB.
admin.attachmentTypeNotAllowed: An unsupported attachment type was detected. Upload common document, image, media, or archive formats.
admin.storage: Task attachment processing failed. Please try again later.

salesman.cannotAccept: You cannot accept this task right now.
salesman.alreadyAccepted: This task was just accepted by someone else. Refresh to see the latest status.
salesman.cannotComplete: You cannot complete this task right now.
salesman.notAccepted: This task cannot be marked as completed yet.
salesman.inactive: This account is not active yet and cannot process tasks.

feedback.createdWithAttachments: The task and attachments have been created.
feedback.assignmentUpdated: The task assignment has been updated.
feedback.assignmentPublic: The task is now visible to everyone.
feedback.deletedWithAttachmentCleanupWarning: The task was deleted, but attachment cleanup did not fully complete. Check storage again later.

admin.confirmDelete: Delete task "{taskName}"? Attached files will be removed as well.

header.title: Administrator Task Board
header.description: Review progress in one place, publish new tasks, and adjust collaboration scope before work begins.

states.noPermissionDescription: The current account is not an administrator and cannot open the task dispatch board.
states.emptyDescription: No tasks match the current filters. Adjust the filters or create a new task first.

filters.searchPlaceholder: Search by task name, creator, team, or assignee

list.title: Task List
list.description: Matched {count} tasks. Use search and filters to find the right item quickly.

createDialog.title: Create Task
createDialog.description: Choose whether the task is visible to everyone or only to a specific team. Attachments will be saved together with the task.
createDialog.taskNamePlaceholder: For example: Follow up this week's client callback materials
createDialog.taskIntroPlaceholder: Add the background, goals, execution requirements, and any notes for this task.
createDialog.attachmentsCta: Click to choose attachments. You can upload multiple files at once.
createDialog.attachmentsHint: Files will be stored in the task-attachments bucket and recorded in the task_sub table. Limit: {maxFiles} files, {maxPerFile} per file, {maxTotal} total.
createDialog.noAttachments: No attachments selected yet. You can create the task with attachments in one step.

assignmentDialog.title: Adjust Task Assignment
assignmentDialog.description: Once work has started, this dialog becomes view-only. Finish scope changes before the task is accepted.
assignmentDialog.viewOnlyNotice: This task is already in progress or completed. It is view-only right now.

validation.taskNameRequired: Please enter a task name first.

feedback.accepted: Task accepted. You can start working on it now.

header.title: Task Center
header.description: Review the tasks you can participate in, track what you are currently handling, and update progress as soon as work is complete.

states.noPermissionDescription: This account cannot open the task center right now. Confirm the account role and status.
states.emptyDescription: No tasks match the current filters right now. Check back again later.

filters.searchPlaceholder: Search task name, details, or task scope

card.takenByOthers: This task is already being handled by another teammate.

header.title: Team Management
header.manageableHint: The current team supports direct updates to its name and members.

descriptions.manager: Managers can maintain their own team profile, members, and client structure. The panel aggregates team records, member records, and referral links automatically.
descriptions.administrator: Administrators can inspect every team, create and delete teams directly, adjust members, and reassign the team manager.
descriptions.salesman: Salesmen can review the currently visible team structure, including members, accumulated clients, and the responsible manager.
descriptions.readOnly: This page shows the visible team structure allowed by database permissions so operations and finance can inspect members and client accumulation together.
descriptions.fallback: This panel aggregates the team profile table, membership table, and client referral relationships into a single management view.

feedback.createdAndContinue: The team has been created. You can continue by adding salesman members next.
feedback.created: A new team has been created.
feedback.memberAdded: The team member has been added.
feedback.memberRemoved: The team member has been removed.

TeamManagement.confirmDelete: Delete team "{teamName}"? This will remove the team record and member assignment relationships.

adminCreate.title: Create Team
adminCreate.description: Administrators can create teams directly and assign a manager during creation. Managers not occupied by other teams are prioritized as assignable.

states.noPermissionDescription: The current account cannot access the team panel right now. The module exposes different data ranges depending on role and activation state.
states.noTeamDataDescription: There is no visible team data yet. Once team relationships are established, an overview will appear here automatically.

managerSetup.title: Create Your Team Workspace
managerSetup.description: Teams are stored with `team_profiles` as the main table and `team_profiles_data` for memberships. You do not have a team record yet, so create the team first and then continue adding salesmen.
managerSetup.emptyTitle: Team Data Has Not Been Set Up Yet
managerSetup.emptyDescription: Once the team is created, this area will start showing members, team clients, and assignable salesman candidates.

overview.title: Team Overview
overview.description: Select a team first to inspect member details and the client structure. Managers default to the team they can manage.

insights.title: Team Snapshot
insights.description: This summarizes team clients using referral relationships from the database so you can judge the current team structure quickly.
insights.activeEmptyDescription: There are no active salesmen in the current team yet. Add members first.
insights.activeReadyDescription: The current team already has a baseline member structure and can continue toward client conversion.
insights.vipEmptyDescription: There are no VIP clients yet. Once team clients receive a VIP flag, this number will grow automatically.
insights.vipReadyDescription: Some clients are already marked as VIP, so you can continue following up alongside orders and commissions.
insights.relationsDescription: The selected team currently accumulates {count} visible client referral relationships.

members.title: Team Members
members.description: Salesman members come from `team_profiles_data`. Each member card also shows the number of direct clients.
members.searchPlaceholder: Search by member name, email, or client status
members.emptyDescription: No team members match the current search.

candidates.title: Available Salesmen
candidates.description: The candidate list comes from users with the `salesman` role. Salesmen already assigned to another team remain marked and cannot be added twice.
candidates.searchPlaceholder: Search salesman name, email, or current team
candidates.availableCount: There are currently {count} salesman candidates who can be added directly.
candidates.emptyDescription: No salesman candidates match the current search.
candidates.readOnlyDescription: This role can inspect team structure here, but member changes are not available.

clients.title: Team Clients
clients.description: Team clients are assembled from salesman referral relationships and include VIP markers.
clients.searchPlaceholder: Search client name, email, or referring salesman
clients.emptyDescription: No team clients match the current search.

errors.missingTeamId: The team was saved, but no team ID was returned.
errors.teamProfileMissing: Create the team first, then continue adding members.
errors.teamNotVisible: The selected team is no longer visible. A resync has been attempted.
errors.salesmanNotAssignable: This salesman cannot join the team right now and may already belong to another team.
errors.managerNotAssignable: This manager cannot be assigned to the team right now and may already be responsible for another team.
errors.cannotManageTeam: The current account cannot manage team details right now.
errors.cannotManageMembers: The current account cannot adjust team members right now.
errors.cannotDeleteTeam: The current account cannot delete the team right now.
errors.teamNotFound: The target team no longer exists and may have been modified by someone else.
